widget.name: EdtsSelectBox
widget.description: Bootstrap-style combo box using react-select with support for association, enumeration, and boolean values.

property.caption: Type
property.description: Choose how the select box stores its selected value.

property.caption: Association
property.description: Select the reference association on the current object.

property.caption: Value Attribute
property.description: Select the enum or boolean attribute on the current object.

property.caption: Selectable Objects
property.description: Select the datasource that provides the association options.

property.caption: Allow Multiple
property.description: Allow selecting multiple objects when the association is a reference set.

property.caption: Caption Attribute
property.description: Select the attribute or association path shown in the dropdown for association options.

property.caption: Label
property.description: Optional field label shown above the select box.

property.caption: Placeholder
property.description: Optional placeholder shown before a value is selected.

property.caption: Helper Text
property.description: Optional helper text shown below the select box when there is no validation error.

property.caption: True Caption
property.description: Caption used for the boolean true option.

property.caption: False Caption
property.description: Caption used for the boolean false option.

property.caption: Allow Clear
property.description: Allow the user to clear the selected option.

property.caption: Allow Search
property.description: Allow the user to search inside the dropdown.

property.caption: Required
property.description: Require the user to select a value.

property.caption: Required Message
property.description: Message shown when the required rule fails.

property.caption: Validate On Change
property.description: Validate as soon as the selected value changes.

property.caption: On Change
property.description: Optional action executed after the selected value changes.

property.caption: On Blur
property.description: Optional action executed when the select box loses focus.
